ddls:
CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "stage" TEXT /* Stage of the feature (e.g., Alpha, Beta, Stable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the feature (e.g., In Progress, Merged) */,
  "sig" TEXT /* Special Interest Group (SIG) responsible for the feature */,
  "proposal_link" TEXT /* Link to the feature's proposal on GitHub */,
  "dev_lead" TEXT /* Development lead for the feature */,
  "assignee" TEXT /* Assignee for the feature */,
  "entity" TEXT /* Entity responsible for the feature (e.g., Google, Red Hat) */,
  "docs_status" TEXT /* Status of the feature's documentation (e.g., In Progress, Done) */,
  "docs_eta" TEXT /* Estimated time of arrival (ETA) for the feature's documentation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the feature was proposed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the feature details were last updated */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the feature */,
  "target_release" TEXT /* Target Kubernetes release version */,
  "dependencies" TEXT /* List of dependent features or components */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_dev_lead FOREIGN KEY ("dev_lead") REFERENCES developers ("developer_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_sig FOREIGN KEY ("sig") REFERENCES sigs ("sig_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_assignee FOREIGN KEY ("assignee") REFERENCES developers ("developer_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_entity FOREIGN KEY ("entity") REFERENCES entities ("entity_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "sigs" (
  "sig_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SIG */,
  "sig_name" TEXT /* Name of the SIG */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the SIG */,
  "lead" TEXT /* Lead developer or contact person for the SIG */,
  "members_count" INTEGER /* Number of members in the SIG */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sig_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the entity */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the entity */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the entity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Name of the developer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the developer */,
  "github_username" TEXT /* Developer's GitHub username */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the developer (e.g., Engineer, Manager) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pull_requests" (
  "pr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pull request */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature the PR is related to */,
  "pr_link" TEXT /* Link to the PR on GitHub */,
  "pr_status" TEXT /* Status of the PR (e.g., Open, Merged, Closed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the PR was created */,
  "closed_at" TEXT /* Date when the PR was closed */,
  "reviewer" TEXT /* Primary reviewer of the PR */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documentation" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each documentation entry */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature the documentation is for */,
  "docs_status" TEXT /* Status of the documentation (e.g., In Progress, Done) */,
  "docs_eta" TEXT /* Estimated time of arrival (ETA) for the documentation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the documentation was started */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the documentation was last updated */,
  "author" TEXT /* Primary author of the documentation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documentation_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)
